title: malveopsis castelnaeana
intro: Malveopsis castelnaeana, also known as Castelnaeana, is a plant species within the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing irritated mucous membranes and reducing inflammation, making it a potential remedy for conditions like asthma and allergies. Malveopsis castelnaeana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it can also be used topically to calm skin irritations and wounds.
